## Meeting purpose

[Discuss Marcel's role and responsibilities as CMO, address feedback on engagement/responsiveness, and align on go-to-market strategy for enterprise customers.](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel feels energized by creative, future-focused work but drained by abstract strategy discussions without clear ownership](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Feedback that Marcel has been difficult to get ahold of, leading to trust issues with some teams relying on marketing](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Need to decide if enterprise motion requires a dedicated leader/team or if it can be absorbed by current marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Potential to hire a VP of Marketing to own enterprise/strategic sales while Marcel focuses on creative, evangelism roles he enjoys](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Role & Responsibilities

  - [Marcel prefers building new things vs maintaining current efforts](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Wants to spend time on energizing work like automation, new channels, creative projects](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [Struggles with ambiguity around enterprise strategy and lack of clear ownership](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Considering changing title from "CMO" to better reflect strengths](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

### Feedback on Engagement/Responsiveness

  - [Multiple people raised concerns about inability to get Marcel's time/attention](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Has led to lack of trust that marketing will be engaged for key initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Marcel acknowledges being less responsive lately, needs to re-engage](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

### Enterprise Go-to-Market Strategy

  - [Disagreement on whether to pursue many enterprise prospects or double down on a few key partners](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=4894.0)
  - [Scott prefers focusing on making Twilio wildly successful as a strategic partner](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=4903.0)
  - [Marcel suggests hiring enterprise sales leader to own landing first lighthouse customer](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=5188.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to re-engage and improve responsiveness in near-term](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Explore hiring VP of Marketing to own enterprise/strategic sales motions](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Schedule leadership offsite to align on priorities and resourcing for enterprise strategy](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=5321.0)
  - [Consider adjusting Marcel's title/role to better match strengths](https://fathom.video/share/G9R7zy7SV2CRq8xsg7FLH13_4NXiFap6?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
